subcodes.first_line: The Dove hath warbled: is there any with ears that will hear? The wings of the Peacock have spread forth: is there any possessed of sight [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد غنت الورقاء هل یری من ذی سمع لیسمع و انتشرت اجنحه الطاوس هل من ذی نظر
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @spiritual transformation, @chastisement and requital, @development of capacity and readiness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
